historical_coverage: All laws of the State of Israel since 1948 and all bills since the 1st Knesset (1949); includes scanned 'laws as enacted' from Reshumot and legislative-history links per law
metadata_availability: rich (per-law legislative events, Reshumot citations, linked bills/protocols)
api_type: underlying data exposed via Knesset OData (ParliamentInfo.svc); no separate documented REST API for the web UI
bulk_download: via Knesset OData / data.gov.il pointer datasets, not via the site UI
robots_policy: unknown (pages served but content is client-side rendered; some knesset.gov.il hosts return HTTP 474 to this environment's fetcher)
terms_status: Knesset website terms; state works — Israeli statute text itself is not copyright-protected (Copyright Act 2007, sec. 6 excludes laws)
license_status: no explicit open license on site; statutory texts free of copyright, site presentation/scans subject to Knesset terms
rag_permission: likely permissible for statutory text (no copyright in laws); confirm Knesset site terms for scraped scans/UI content
recommended_ingestion: Use Knesset OData for structured metadata + fetch law/bill documents (PDF/DOC) linked per record; render-aware crawler needed for the JS UI (apps/legislation)
notes: Existence and scope confirmed via Knesset legislation-process page (fetched OK), gov.il service catalog entries ('החוקים כפי שנחקקו', 'חוקי מדינת ישראל', 'כל הצעות החוק' — all pointing to this database) and data.gov.il. Direct fetches of lawhome/lawaboutsite returned HTTP 200 with client-side-rendered (blank) HTML; the new SPA at /apps/legislation returned HTTP 474 (WAF/geo-block) from this environment.

historical_coverage: Bills back to early Knessets (KNS_Bill dump contains 60,240 bills incl. KnessetNum field); committees, members, factions, agenda, statuses; vote data in newer Knessets
metadata_availability: very rich structured relational tables (KNS_* entity sets)
api_type: OData v3 (WCF Data Services; Atom/XML and JSON via $format), queryable with $filter/$top/$skip
feeds: OData Atom feeds per entity set
bulk_download: paginated API pulls; community CSV dumps mirrored at production.oknesset.org/pipelines/data/
terms_status: published as open parliamentary data (listed on data.gov.il as 'מאגר פרלמנטרי נגיש' with an OData resource); exact license text unconfirmed
license_status: open-government-data intent; explicit license unconfirmed
rag_permission: metadata reuse widely practiced (hasadna, MCP servers, academic use); confirm formal terms
last_observed_update: unknown (endpoint not reachable from this environment)
recommended_ingestion: Incremental sync by LastUpdatedDate on KNS_Bill/KNS_Law tables via OData from an Israeli IP; fall back to oknesset.org CSV dumps
notes: Direct fetches (root service doc, $metadata, entity queries, www variant) all returned HTTP 474 from this environment — knesset.gov.il appears geo/WAF-blocked to non-Israeli cloud egress. Endpoint URL and entity sets confirmed via multiple independent sources: data.gov.il catalog (OData resource), zohar/knesset-mcp (base URL + KNS_Bill, KNS_Status, KNS_Committee, KNS_Faction, KNS_KnessetMember), hasadna/knesset-data project, and field-level confirmation from the kns_bill datapackage dump (BillID, KnessetNum, Name, SubTypeDesc, StatusID, CommitteeID, PublicationDate, MagazineNumber, PageNumber, LastUpdatedDate...). Confirmed entity sets: KNS_Bill, KNS_BillName, KNS_Agenda, KNS_Committee, KNS_JointCommittee, KNS_KnessetMember, KNS_Person, KNS_Faction, KNS_Status, KNS_Position. NEVER assume additional services (Votes.svc etc.) without confirming.

name_he: הצעות חוק באתר הכנסת (מאגר החקיקה — מודול הצעות חוק)
historical_coverage: All bills (government, private, committee) from the 1st Knesset (1949) to the current Knesset, per gov.il service descriptions
metadata_availability: rich (status, initiators, committee, readings, Reshumot publication)
api_type: same data via Knesset OData KNS_Bill/KNS_BillName + document links
feeds: Knesset RSS services exist (knesset.gov.il/rssservice/*) — reported by search index, unconfirmed from this environment
terms_status: Knesset website terms; bill texts are state works (no copyright in official legal texts)
license_status: no explicit open license
rag_permission: likely permissible for bill texts; confirm site terms
stability: medium (UI migrated to new SPA; URLs changed over the years)
recommended_ingestion: Prefer OData KNS_Bill for metadata; fetch bill documents from fs.knesset.gov.il links (requires Israeli egress)
notes: SPA URL returned HTTP 474 to this environment; existence confirmed via search results and gov.il catalog entries describing the service.

historical_coverage: Recent Knessets fully online; older protocols progressively digitized (Knesset Archive holds full record since 1949)
metadata_availability: session metadata in OData (committee sessions tables); documents on fs.knesset.gov.il
api_type: Knesset OData committee/session entity sets + document URLs; no dedicated protocol API
feeds: RSS: https://www.knesset.gov.il/rssservice/committee_protocol.aspx (seen in search index; fetch blocked HTTP 474)
bulk_download: community dumps of committee tables at production.oknesset.org/pipelines/data/committees/
terms_status: official parliamentary record; Knesset site terms apply
license_status: no explicit open license; protocols are official state records
rag_permission: likely permissible (official proceedings); confirm terms; note privacy of speakers' remarks
update_frequency: daily during sessions (protocols published days-weeks after hearings)
technical_difficulty: medium-high (document store fs.knesset.gov.il geo-blocked; DOC formats vary by era)
recommended_ingestion: OData session metadata -> fetch protocol files from fs.knesset.gov.il via Israeli egress; parse DOC/DOCX
notes: Pages confirmed via search; m.knesset.gov.il and fs.knesset.gov.il returned HTTP 474 to this environment (geo/WAF). fs.knesset.gov.il/globaldocs/... is the actual file server for protocols and other Knesset documents.

historical_coverage: Divrei HaKnesset series since 1949; searchable session protocols online ('חיפוש בדברי הכנסת' at Activity/plenum/pages/sessions.aspx)
metadata_availability: session/agenda/vote metadata in Knesset OData (KNS_Agenda confirmed)
api_type: Knesset OData for session metadata; documents as files
bulk_download: no official bulk; community mirrors partial
terms_status: official parliamentary record; Knesset site terms
license_status: no explicit open license
rag_permission: likely permissible (official proceedings); confirm terms
update_frequency: per sitting; official Divrei HaKnesset volumes lag
technical_difficulty: medium-high (geo-block; OCR needed for old scanned volumes)
recommended_ingestion: Session list via OData/site, files from fs.knesset.gov.il with Israeli egress; OCR pipeline for pre-digital volumes
notes: URLs confirmed via search results ('חיפוש בדברי הכנסת', 'Knesset — plenumallprotocols'); direct fetches blocked (474/blank SPA). Historic 13th-Knesset plenum PDFs also found mirrored at archive.nyu.edu, confirming the document series.

name_he: רשומות — העיתון הרשמי (ספר החוקים, קובץ התקנות, ילקוט הפרסומים)
name_en: Reshumot — Official Gazette of Israel on gov.il
publisher: משרד המשפטים — מחלקת רשומות (Ministry of Justice, Reshumot Department)
historical_coverage: Digitized booklets on gov.il; series exist since 1948/9 (Sefer HaChukim, Kovetz HaTakanot, Yalkut HaPirsumim, Hatza'ot Chok); depth of the online archive per series not fully confirmed
metadata_availability: booklet-level metadata (type, number, Hebrew year, date, table of contents)
api_type: no documented public API; documents are served through justice.gov.il SearchPredefinedApi backend (undocumented)
robots_policy: gov.il returned HTTP 403 to some automated fetches from this environment (WAF); one fetch of the collector succeeded
terms_status: gov.il terms of use; gazette content is official state publication — statutes/regulations not copyright-protected
license_status: official publication; no explicit open license on gov.il
rag_permission: legal texts reusable (no copyright in laws); gov.il scraping subject to site terms/WAF
stability: medium (moved from old rashumot/justice sites to gov.il dynamic collector)
technical_difficulty: medium (WAF, dynamic collector JSON backend, PDF-only)
recommended_ingestion: Poll the dynamic collector (booklet type + date filters) for new booklets; store PDFs; OCR/parse; this is the authoritative 'as published' source incl. all secondary legislation (קובץ התקנות)
notes: Fetch of the collector confirmed the search UI and filters (booklet type, booklet number, TOC, Hebrew year, date range, full-text within booklet). Example PDF delivery endpoints (rfa.justice.gov.il and free-justice.openapi.gov.il SearchPredefinedApi) observed in search index serving Yalkut HaPirsumim PDFs — undocumented backend, use with care. Arabic translations unit exists (רשומות בערבית on gov.il).

historical_coverage: Memoranda published since the site launched in 2010 (law.co.il reported the 2010 launch); includes past and current memoranda and draft secondary legislation
metadata_availability: per-memorandum record pages (ministry, dates, comment window)
api_type: none documented (Salesforce Experience Cloud site; record URLs like /s/legislativeworkactivity/<id>)
robots_policy: robots.txt could not be retrieved from this environment (server TLS handshake failure with fetcher)
terms_status: gov.il/MoJ terms; memoranda are official state documents
license_status: no explicit open license; draft-legislation texts effectively reusable as state legal documents
rag_permission: likely permissible; confirm terms
recommended_ingestion: Crawl /s/ listing with headless browser from compatible network; capture memorandum metadata + attached draft documents
notes: All direct fetches failed: first with SSL certificate-verification error on the target's robots.txt, then proxy rate-limit. Existence, structure (about page, individual memorandum pages open for public comment with deadlines) confirmed via multiple search results including moj.my.site.com knowledge-base article 'הפצת תזכירי חוק וטיוטות חקיקת משנה להערות הציבור'.

name_en: The Open Book of Laws (Hebrew Wikisource consolidated statutes)
publisher: מתנדבי ויקיטקסט + הסדנא לידע ציבורי + ויקימדיה ישראל
historical_coverage: Consolidated current versions of hundreds of Israeli laws and selected regulations, continuously amended from Reshumot
metadata_availability: wiki page metadata, revision history, amendment annotations
api_type: MediaWiki Action API + REST + wikitext export + full XML dumps (dumps.wikimedia.org)
terms_status: Wikimedia Terms of Use
license_status: CC BY-SA (editorial contributions); underlying statutory text not copyright-protected
rag_permission: yes, with CC BY-SA attribution/share-alike for the consolidated editorial layer
update_frequency: ongoing volunteer updates after each Reshumot publication (lag varies by law)
legal_risk: low (must not present as official/binding text; volunteer consolidations may lag)
recommended_ingestion: MediaWiki API export of the project category pages / hewikisource dumps; track revision timestamps per law as freshness signal
notes: he.wikisource.org was not fetchable from this environment (fetcher marks the domain cache-only), so verified via the project's own portal openlaw.org.il (fetched successfully — describes the Wikisource project, consolidation from Reshumot, disclaimer of non-authoritativeness) and via search results showing the project pages (project page, 'חוקים חסרים' worklist).

publisher: הסדנא לידע ציבורי (Public Knowledge Workshop) + ויקימדיה ישראל
historical_coverage: Reported on-site: over 250 laws and regulations in consolidated, current versions (content mirrors the Wikisource project)
metadata_availability: basic (law pages with amendment annotations)
api_type: none documented on portal; source data available via Wikisource APIs
terms_status: project disclaimer: not legal advice, not guaranteed authoritative/complete/current
license_status: CC BY-SA editorial layer (Wikisource-sourced)
rag_permission: yes, with attribution (CC BY-SA)
recommended_ingestion: Prefer ingesting from Wikisource APIs/dumps; use openlaw.org.il for project documentation and law index
notes: Homepage fetched successfully; confirms collaboration between Public Knowledge Workshop and Wikimedia Israel, 250+ consolidated laws/regulations, consolidation from ministry documents and Reshumot, explicit non-authoritative disclaimer.

name_en: Knesset Research and Information Center (RIC / MMM) publications
historical_coverage: Reports since the center's founding in 2000; thousands of documents; document search at Activity/Info/Research/pages/search.aspx
metadata_availability: title/date/author/committee metadata in site search; PDFs hosted on fs.knesset.gov.il/globaldocs/MMM/
api_type: unknown (community projects reference MMM data; no confirmed public API)
bulk_download: no official; Nevo mirrors a folder of RIC documents
terms_status: Knesset publication; reports carry Knesset attribution
license_status: no explicit open license
rag_permission: likely permissible with attribution as official parliamentary research; confirm terms
recommended_ingestion: Scrape search index from Israeli egress; download PDFs from fs.knesset.gov.il; strong source for legislative intent context
notes: Search/landing URLs confirmed via search results; an MMM PDF on fs.knesset.gov.il appeared in the search index (a comparative survey on official publications) but direct fetch returned HTTP 474 (geo/WAF). Nevo hosts a mirror folder of RIC documents (FilesFolderPermalink 'מסמכי מרכז המחקר והמידע').

name_he: מאגרי מידע ממשלתיים — data.gov.il (חקיקה ונתוני כנסת)
publisher: מערך הדיגיטל הלאומי / רשות התקשוב (gov.il open data portal)
historical_coverage: Catalog entries: 'חוקי מדינת ישראל', 'החוקים כפי שנחקקו', 'כל הצעות החוק', 'מאגר פרלמנטרי נגיש (OData)', 'מאגר האסדרה', Knesset votes dataset ('votes-knesset')
metadata_availability: full CKAN metadata (org, resources, formats, license field)
api_type: CKAN Action API v3 (package_search, datastore where enabled), JSON
feeds: CKAN RSS for dataset updates (standard CKAN capability, unconfirmed here)
bulk_download: per-resource downloads; datastore API for tabular resources
robots_policy: API fetch succeeded; dataset HTML pages are client-side rendered (blank to plain fetchers)
terms_status: gov.il open data terms
license_status: portal aims at open government licensing; per-dataset license field must be checked
rag_permission: generally yes for open-data resources; verify per dataset
recommended_ingestion: Use CKAN API to enumerate legislation/Knesset datasets and pull tabular resources (e.g., regulation database XLSX, votes)
notes: CKAN API fetched successfully: 8 datasets matched 'חקיקה', including Knesset-published pointers to the National Legislation Database and the OData parliamentary service, plus the Regulation Authority's regulation database (XLSX).

primary_or_secondary: secondary (catalog of regulation; not the authoritative Kovetz HaTakanot text)
historical_coverage: Regulations in force cataloged pursuant to the Principles of Regulation Law framework; built from 2022 onward
metadata_availability: structured records per regulation (regulator, domain, legal source)
api_type: data.gov.il CKAN resource (XLSX dump 'מאגר האסדרה — Regulation Database'); gov.il dynamic collector JSON backend (undocumented)
robots_policy: gov.il WAF returned 403 to some automated fetches
terms_status: gov.il terms; published as open data on data.gov.il
license_status: open-data listing; per-resource license to verify
rag_permission: likely yes (open data), verify license field
recommended_ingestion: Pull XLSX from data.gov.il regularly; use as an index of secondary legislation in force, cross-link to Kovetz HaTakanot PDFs in Reshumot
notes: Dataset confirmed via CKAN API fetch (organization: Regulatory Authority, format XLSX, description referencing the statutory duty to maintain a regulation database). The gov.il collector page itself and the dataset HTML page were not renderable from this environment (WAF 403 / client-side rendering).

name_he: מאגרי נתוני הכנסת של הסדנא לידע ציבורי (knesset-data)
name_en: Hasadna knesset-data pipelines and CSV dumps (oknesset)
publisher: הסדנא לידע ציבורי (Public Knowledge Workshop) — open-source project
historical_coverage: Full-table dumps of Knesset OData: e.g. kns_bill with 60,240 rows covering bills across Knessets; members, committees, positions
metadata_availability: frictionless datapackage.json per table with full field schemas
api_type: static HTTP directory of CSV + datapackage.json (frictionless data)
terms_status: code MIT (hasadna/knesset-data); data is public parliamentary data
license_status: MIT tooling; data reuse per Knesset open-data status
rag_permission: yes for metadata tables; attribute hasadna; verify freshness
update_frequency: pipeline-driven; freshness varies (project maintenance has slowed — last knesset-data release 2017, pipelines repo more recent)
recommended_ingestion: Best workaround for the Knesset OData geo-block: download table CSVs (bills, committees, members) and validate against datapackage schemas; verify LastUpdatedDate recency before relying on it
notes: datapackage.json for kns_bill fetched successfully (60,240 rows, 15.66MB CSV, 23 fields incl. BillID, KnessetNum, StatusID, MagazineNumber, PublicationSeriesDesc, LastUpdatedDate). Directory index URLs returned a redirect loop to the fetcher but are indexed by search engines (bills, members, committees tables). GitHub repo hasadna/knesset-data fetched OK (MIT, python package, django module).

publisher: נבו הוצאה לאור בע"מ (Nevo Publishing Ltd.)
access: mixed (some free pages; core is subscription)
historical_coverage: Market-leading coverage: consolidated legislation, historical Reshumot booklets, Mandate-era legislation (per market reputation; not verifiable from the pages fetched)
metadata_availability: rich editorial metadata (versions, amendment history)
api_type: none public
feeds: email newsletters (largest legal mailing list in Israel per site)
terms_status: proprietary subscription terms; scraping prohibited in practice
license_status: proprietary editorial content over public legal texts
rag_permission: no without a commercial license agreement
legal_risk: high (copyright in consolidations/editorial apparatus; contract terms)
recommended_ingestion: Only via negotiated data license; otherwise use as manual reference benchmark
notes: Homepage fetched (confirms subscription model, government procurement of the database, court-decision coverage); /law.aspx blocked by robots.txt to the fetcher. Legislation-module details known from market reputation — recorded here as unverified where not seen.

historical_coverage: Laws, bills, Reshumot references, case law (per homepage); depth unverified
metadata_availability: unknown
api_type: none public (AI research features advertised for subscribers)
terms_status: proprietary
license_status: proprietary
rag_permission: no without license
recommended_ingestion: Not recommended for ingestion; possible commercial partnership
notes: Homepage fetched successfully: confirms laws/bills/Reshumot/case-law coverage, freemium registration, AI-assisted research tier.

name_he: העיתון הרשמי של ממשלת המנדט (Palestine Gazette) — ארכיון המדינה ב-Pinpoint
name_en: Palestine Gazette 1921-1948 (Israel State Archives, Google Pinpoint collection)
publisher: ארכיון המדינה (Israel State Archives), hosted on Google Pinpoint
primary_or_secondary: primary (scans of the official gazette of Mandatory Palestine)
historical_coverage: 1921-1948 Palestine Gazette (Hebrew edition; English/Hebrew documents) plus Israeli provisional-government publications 1948-1949; ~160,000 scanned pages
metadata_availability: OCR + entity extraction (people, organizations, locations), year/language filters
api_type: none (Pinpoint UI only)
robots_policy: Google product pages; automated scraping restricted by Google ToS
terms_status: State Archives collection; Google Pinpoint terms for access
license_status: Mandate-era official texts are out of copyright; scans held by State Archives
rag_permission: texts themselves public domain; bulk extraction from Pinpoint restricted — source scans from the Archives directly for bulk use
hebrew_quality: good OCR of historical Hebrew (verify per document)
recommended_ingestion: Use for research lookup; for corpus ingestion approach Israel State Archives for the underlying scans/OCR
notes: Fetched successfully: confirmed as 'The Palestine gazette in Hebrew' from the Israel State Archives, ~160,000 scanned pages, 1921-1948 plus provisional-government era, searchable with year/language/entity filters. Key source for Mandate-era ordinances still in force.

subcategory: historical-archives (government records incl. early Reshumot and legislative files)
access: free (account registration required for some viewing/ordering)
historical_coverage: State records from the Mandate era and since 1948, incl. government yearbooks, cabinet records, and digitized historical files; millions of items, partially scanned
metadata_availability: catalog metadata per file/item; catalog itself published as a dataset on data.gov.il (israel-state-archives-catalog)
api_type: no documented public API; catalog dataset available via data.gov.il
bulk_download: catalog metadata via data.gov.il; documents no
terms_status: terms of use published on site (תנאי שימוש)
license_status: state archival material; per-item restrictions possible (privacy/security classifications)
rag_permission: case-by-case; old official publications generally public domain
recommended_ingestion: Use data.gov.il catalog dataset for discovery; targeted retrieval of legislative-history files; not a bulk text source
notes: Catalog homepage fetched successfully: confirms search (documents + genealogy), featured collections (Balfour Declaration, Eichmann Trial, government yearbooks), registration requirement and terms of use. Complements the Pinpoint Palestine Gazette collection for pre-state and early-state legal history.

historical_coverage: Current procedural rules; links to Basic Laws, Knesset Rules of Procedure (תקנון הכנסת), Legal Department guides
metadata_availability: n/a (static explanatory pages)
api_type: none
robots_policy: served to fetcher (this page rendered server-side, unlike the SPA sections)
terms_status: Knesset site terms
license_status: no explicit open license
rag_permission: likely permissible; low volume
recommended_ingestion: One-off ingestion of process pages, Rules of Procedure and lexicon as system-knowledge documents for the legislative-process domain
notes: Fetched successfully: describes bill initiation routes (government/private/committee), preliminary/first/second/third readings, publication in Reshumot, links to the 13 Basic Laws and Knesset Rules of Procedure. Useful canonical description of the legislative pipeline for the registry's process ontology.

primary_or_secondary: primary (authoritative copies of bills, protocols, RIC reports)
historical_coverage: Documents referenced by Knesset OData and site pages: bill texts, committee protocols, plenum documents, MMM reports; coverage follows the referencing systems
metadata_availability: none on server; document URLs carry GUIDs and are referenced from OData document tables
api_type: static file hosting addressed via GUID paths (/globaldocs/<type>/<guid>/...)
bulk_download: no official; enumeration only via OData document-link tables
terms_status: Knesset site terms
license_status: official documents; no explicit license
rag_permission: likely permissible for official documents; confirm terms
technical_difficulty: medium (geo/WAF blocked from foreign cloud egress; must resolve URLs via OData)
recommended_ingestion: Resolve document URLs from Knesset OData tables, fetch from Israeli egress, convert DOC/PDF to text
notes: Direct fetch returned HTTP 474 (same WAF/geo-block as other knesset.gov.il hosts). Server's role and URL pattern confirmed via search-indexed PDFs (an MMM comparative survey on official publications) and community documentation. Listed separately because it is the actual retrieval endpoint for most Knesset full-text documents.

name_he: ממשק מסמכי רשומות של משרד המשפטים (SearchPredefinedApi)
name_en: Ministry of Justice Reshumot document delivery API (rfa.justice.gov.il / free-justice.openapi.gov.il)
publisher: משרד המשפטים (Ministry of Justice) via gov.il open API gateway
historical_coverage: unknown (observed serving current Yalkut HaPirsumim booklets, e.g. no. 13438 of May 2025)
metadata_availability: unknown (documents addressed by encrypted tokens; discovery presumably via the gov.il gazette collector)
api_type: REST document-delivery endpoint (SearchPredefinedApi); no public documentation found
terms_status: unknown (gov.il API gateway 'free' tier path suggests open access)
license_status: official gazette content — statutory text free of copyright
rag_permission: content yes; endpoint usage terms unknown
last_observed_update: May 2025 booklet observed in search index
recommended_ingestion: Investigate how the gov.il gazette collector generates these document tokens; if stable, this is the machine route to Reshumot PDFs — do not build on it before confirming documentation/terms
notes: Two live document URLs surfaced in the search index (rfa.justice.gov.il and free-justice.openapi.gov.il) serving Yalkut HaPirsumim PDFs; not fetched directly from this environment and no documentation located. Recorded honestly as unverified infrastructure worth investigating; NOT a documented public API.

historical_coverage: unknown (modern Knessets; complements the historical Divrei HaKnesset archive)
metadata_availability: unknown
api_type: unknown
terms_status: Knesset site terms
license_status: no explicit open license
rag_permission: unknown
recommended_ingestion: Not for bulk ingestion; use published protocols (plenum entry) instead
notes: Referenced in search results as the online plenum system; not fetchable from this environment (knesset.gov.il WAF). Kept as a pointer; rely on the plenumallprotocols/sessions pages for archival transcripts.
